headerTitle: Senior Full Stack Engineer  ·  API-First SaaS  ·  TypeScript / Next.js  ·  Austin TX
intro: SerpApi powers search data at scale for thousands of developers — reliability, performance, and clean API design are the table stakes. Thirteen production platforms with 100+ API routes and daily multi-model AI engineering are the working baseline.
bullets: TypeScript + Next.js 15 + PostgreSQL in production — 13 platforms, 100+ API routes, Prisma ORM, multi-tenant architecture patterns. Next.js App Router, React 19, Tailwind, Zod validation, BullMQ + Redis job queues. Can ship a meaningful PR in week one.

API-first engineering mindset — REST API design, webhook pipelines, Stripe billing, Google OAuth2, IMAP integration, Twilio/Sinch, county appraisal district APIs. Experience with messy real-world data from undocumented schemas under real operational load.

Austin-based, full ownership — Founder-led solo engineering across 13 production platforms means no hand-holding required. Architectural decisions, deployment, infra, and quality are all one person’s responsibility. That discipline transfers directly.
matchNotes: Strong stack match: TypeScript, Next.js, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, developer-facing tooling. Austin TX = in-market advantage. Not an FDE role — standard senior SWE hire. SerpApi is developer-focused B2B. $150-180K is solid. High ownership startup culture matches.
